channel.title: FretMemo Blog
channel.description: Insights on theory, practice, and the art of the guitar.

item.title: I Played Guitar for 8 Years Before I Actually Knew the Fretboard
item.description: A personal story about overcoming the fear of the fretboard and finally learning the notes.

item.title: The Spider Walk Is Boring. Here's How to Make It Useful.
item.description: Turn the most boring guitar exercise into a powerful fretboard learning tool with 3 levels of difficulty.

item.title: I Tried Every Fretboard App So You Don't Have To
item.description: An honest comparison of the most popular fretboard learning apps, from paid giants to free web tools.

item.title: Why the Fretboard Makes No Sense (And It's Not Your Fault)
item.description: The guitar is structurally confusing compared to other instruments. Here's why and how to deal with it.

item.title: Why Random Practice Feels Harder But Works Better
item.description: The science of interleaved practice and why struggling to find notes is actually a sign of deep learning.

item.title: No Guitar? No Problem. Practice in Your Head.
item.description: Learn how to visualize the fretboard and practice anywhere: commute, boring meetings, or before bed.

item.title: 5 Technique Exercises That Actually Make You Better
item.description: Beyond the spider walk: Permutation, String Skipping, Diagonal Patterns, Legato, and Linear shifting.

item.title: What Guitarists Actually Need From a Trainer
item.description: Why most apps fail (subscriptions, bad mics) and what a focused practice tool should actually look like.

item.title: What's Coming to FretMemo
item.description: Streaks, Heat Maps, Ear Training, PWA support, and more. The roadmap for the future of FretMemo.
